# DevCheck

> DevCheck is a free, step-by-step property development feasibility tool for small-to-medium residential developments (1–12 dwellings) in South Australia. It is built on the methodology of Clinton Barker Property (eXp Realty, SA).

DevCheck helps property developers, investors and homeowners quickly assess whether a South Australian residential development site stacks up financially — before committing money to plans, planners or builders.

## What it does
- **Tick & Flick** — a 3–5 minute go/no-go site assessment for a fast verdict.
- **Full Feasibility** — a 15–25 minute analysis producing a PASS / MARGINAL / FAIL verdict with profit, margin on cost, key risks and recommended next steps.
- Handles South Australian specifics: Planning & Design Code zoning, SA Water and SAPN connection costs, GST treatment (margin scheme / full / absorbed), slope and site constraints.
- Produces an emailable and printable PDF feasibility report.

## Who it's for
Property developers, investors and homeowners considering small-to-medium residential development (subdivision, townhouses, units) in South Australia — particularly the northern Adelaide councils (Salisbury, Playford, Tea Tree Gully and surrounds).

## Important
DevCheck is calibrated for South Australian residential developments only and provides a preliminary guide based strictly on user inputs. It is not financial, legal, planning or tax advice; all figures must be verified with qualified professionals.

## About
